# LimbahGuna

> AI-powered platform digitizing agricultural waste with automated quality grading, computer vision classification, and real-time CO₂ tracking for the circular economy.

LimbahGuna connects biomass producers, eco-partners, and material recovery facilities through a unified pipeline. Computer Vision AI identifies waste type, quality grade, and carbon impact in seconds, while a marketplace and pickup tracking system close the loop from field to factory.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with hero, AI demo video, ecosystem overview, process, and impact metrics.
